title: Masbate Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Masbate with a Z-Score of +4.49. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heat wave in Masbate is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 54%, and the wind speed is 8.8 km/h, which is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat. 
 The lack of rainfall and high temperatures will exacerbate the situation, leading to severe heat-related issues.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
